content: Self-Refine’s task-specific iterative self-improvement without external data can be paired with Reflexion’s dynamic long-term memory to create a hierarchical self-reflection system for autonomous agents, where Self-Refine handles low-level output polishing and Reflexion aggregates cross-task reflective lessons to refine future self-feedback prompts. This structure eliminates the need for both external supervision and static reward modeling across sequential agent tasks.
